{{Quote|The Jedi order has the full support and cooperation of Eriadu and the Seswenna sector.|Gideon Tarkin on Master Madorin and the Jedi Order|<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>}}
'''Hyris-Well Madorin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Hyris-Well Madorin was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. As conflicts, disputes, and a general crisis threatened the safety of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] resources were spread thin as many [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were called out into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to negotiate and discuss security. The Jedi, which included Madorin, eventually developed unique [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], created specifically for use by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]].<ref name="HNN56" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], as the schismatic conflict went on, he was stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] when the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] assigned him to travel to a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base at [[Phelar Port/Legends|Phelar Port]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]].<ref name="HNN56" />

From the Eriadu port, Jedi Master Hyris-Well Madorin met with [[Brigadier]] [[Gideon Tarkin]] to discuss the movement of the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 Jedi interceptors]] and the increased security of the vital [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]]. He stated to Madorin that his planet remained loyal to the Republic, as well as the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]. Later, he led a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of twelve interceptors to defend the planet from an upcoming invasion of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]].<ref name="HNN56" />
